title: Resultant Height
body: Two sinusoidal waves are moving through a medium in the positive $$x-direction$$, both having amplitudes of $$7.00$$ cm, a wave number of $$k=3.00$$ $$\frac{rad}{m}$$, an angular frequency of $$omega=2.50$$ $$\frac{rad}{s}$$, and a period of $$6.00$$ s, but one has a phase shift of an angle $$phi=\frac{\pi}{12}$$ rad.
